message:
Improve accessibility for filter components

CategoryFilter.tsx and TagFilter.tsx accessibility improvements:
- Replace Badge with semantic button elements
- Add aria-pressed for toggle state indication
- Add role="group" with aria-label/aria-labelledby
- Add aria-hidden="true" to decorative icons
- Add descriptive aria-labels for clear buttons
- Improve focus visibility with focus-visible:ring-2

These changes improve keyboard navigation and screen reader
support for the category and tag filter interfaces.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
